lines.text: Pools at Disney's Contemporary Resort | Walt Disney World Resort
Enjoy heated pools and much more on the shores of Bay Lake. Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.
From a waterslide to our relaxing spas, there’s something fun for everyone at Disney’s Contemporary Resort.
Soak up the sun amid marina views and white-sand beaches at our main “Feature Pool” (blissfully heated for all-weather comfort)—or make a splash shooting down our 17-foot-high, curving waterslide!
Need to pamper yourself? Rent a poolside cabana by the hour or day, and enjoy a private retreat with flat-screen TV, iPod docking station, Resort phone and mini-fridge!

While your kids enjoy the fountains and waterspouts of our futuristic water playground, parents can retreat to the nearby Bay Lake Pool—an all-ages leisure pool where loud noises and splashing are gently discouraged.
The Resort pool area also features a second hot tub near the waterslide and a seasonal poolside bar offering a delicious selection of cold drinks and refreshing snacks.

Let’s make a splash at Feature Pool! Join us for family-friendly activities each day, like themed pool parties and other cool activities. Fun offerings include themed pool games, relays, trivia and more! See a Recreation Host for additional details.
Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.
Complimentary towels are provided at all pools.
